creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
thank you for the helpful notes. i do intend to fix this port up for reinclusion in the tree as soon as i am able.

there has been a new upstream release since this port was put in the attic. i stepped through the minor diff before i set the new checksum.

this utility is a one-tick pony, it supports only tiff as input and only png as output. more capable and flexible multiplexing converters purportedly can discard some options or data that this utility maybe does better at mapping 1-to-1.
